OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Checks whether the employer has responded to a workers' compensation claim filed by an employee. The check is done by fetching an individual application of type Acknowledged Claim associated with the claim.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CheckClaimResponseStatus

childElements.name: ClaimAcknowledged
FetchClaimDetails
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsFetchClaimDetails", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "claimid", "sendJSONPath" : "ContextId", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: ClaimYetToBeAcknowledged
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "additionalOutput" : { "ClaimAcknowledged" : false }, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(AcknowledgedClaimIA|1)", "label" : "ResponseAction2", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { } }

omniProcessElements.name: FetchIndvApplnForEmployerResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsFetchIndvApplnForEmployerResponse", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "AcknowledgedClaimIA", "responseJSONPath" : "AcknowledgedClaimIA", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "ClaimId", "sendJSONPath" : "ContextId", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
